name: whatsapp-send
title: Send a WhatsApp message
description: Open WhatsApp Web, find a contact, and send them a message. The one recipe for WhatsApp messaging — `open-chat` resolves the contact robustly: it searches the full name, and if no result appears it falls back to a 'mini match' (shorter search term), then opens the row that best matches the name by word-overlap — so it tolerates an extra or misspelled middle name and first-name-only inputs. You must already be logged in (only the human logs in; the session persists in the local profile). Cook with: loop run whatsapp-send contact="<name>" message="<text>"
